context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 450 SWR caching fully verified. Key files: useAPI.js (SWR wrapper with authedFetcher, prefetchAPI for hover prefetch), App.js (SWRConfig at line 255), ProfilePage.js (6 useAPI hooks for profile/records/ratings/value/streak/dream data), ExplorePage.js (6 useAPI hooks for explore sections), Navbar.js (onMouseEnter prefetch handlers at lines 102/111/120). SWR config: revalidateOnFocus=false, dedupingInterval=10000ms, errorRetryCount=2. Profile re-load shows instant data (0.92s, no skeleton) confirming cache working.
